title: AANA Support Runtime Incident Response Plan

scope.production_position: pilot-ready/production-candidate; not production-certified by local tests alone

severity_levels.name: Critical
severity_levels.definition: Confirmed unsafe accept, private-data exposure, unauthorized irreversible action, auth bypass, or audit leakage affecting support workflows.

severity_levels.name: High
severity_levels.definition: Likely unsafe accept, repeated high-risk false accepts, email-send fail-open behavior, connector permission incident, or hard-blocker spike with user impact risk.

severity_levels.name: Medium
severity_levels.definition: Elevated false blocks, over-refusal, stale evidence, connector failures, high latency, or human-review backlog that degrades support workflows.

severity_levels.name: Low
severity_levels.definition: Documentation, dashboard, non-user-impacting alert, or isolated advisory-mode issue without unsafe acceptance.

rollback_triggers.condition: AANA returns accept/pass for a support candidate that leaks private data, invents account facts, bypasses verification, or allows unauthorized irreversible send.
rollback_triggers.action: Switch affected support adapters to shadow mode and run kubectl rollout undo deployment/aana-bridge -n aana-runtime.

rollback_triggers.condition: Audit record, bridge log, dashboard payload, or reviewer report contains raw customer message, raw candidate, full CRM record, payment data, internal note, attachment body, secret, or token.
rollback_triggers.action: Stop audit ingestion, revoke exposed credentials if needed, quarantine affected audit artifacts, and roll back to last-known-good runtime.

rollback_triggers.condition: Bridge auth bypass, token exposure, over-broad connector permission, unauthorized source read, or missing DLP/recipient verification on email send.
rollback_triggers.action: Disable affected connector or email enforcement path, rotate tokens, and roll back if runtime behavior contributed.

rollback_triggers.condition: Bridge outage or readiness failure could allow irreversible sends, exports, deletes, deployments, or account actions to proceed without AANA.
rollback_triggers.action: Fail closed for irreversible action paths, route drafts to advisory mode, and roll back the bridge deployment if the outage follows a release.

rollback_triggers.condition: Over-refusal, false blocker, latency, connector failure, stale evidence, or hard-blocker spike breaches the observability policy for more than one review window.
rollback_triggers.action: Freeze promotion, keep enforcement narrow, review audit sample, and roll back if the regression started with the current runtime or adapter version.

notification_paths.owner: Security Operations Reviewer and Privacy Review Owner

records_to_collect: redacted audit JSONL records for the incident window
audit integrity manifest and verification output
audit metrics and AIx drift report
affected workflow IDs and adapter IDs
violation codes, hard blockers, recommended actions, and human review routes
connector source IDs and evidence freshness metadata
audit_review_procedure.raw_data_policy: Do not copy raw customer messages, raw candidate responses, CRM records, payment data, internal notes, attachment bodies, secrets, or tokens into the incident record.

review_questions: Did any customer-visible support reply include invented facts, private data, unsafe refund promise, internal CRM note, or unsupported billing/payment statement?
Did any irreversible email send, ticket update, account action, refund communication, or escalation proceed without required verification?
How many customers, tickets, workflows, and adapters were affected?
Was customer remediation, correction, deletion, notification, refund review, or support follow-up required?
Did human review agree with the AANA route, and did the reviewer queue meet SLA?
remediation_paths: correct or retract unsafe support message
route privacy/security issues through approved incident process
freeze affected adapter enforcement until owner signoff
record lessons learned and update verifier, route map, AIx tuning, or evidence connector
